title: Grade 2 Math
description: Grade 2 math curriculum aligned to the Texas Essential Knowledge and Skills (TEKS). Topics include place value to 1,200, addition and subtraction within 1,000, intro to multiplication, basic fractions, geometry, money, and time.

units.title: Place Value to 1,200
units.summary: Read, write, compare, and order numbers up to 1,200.

lessons.title: Place value to 1,200
lessons.objective: Identify hundreds, tens, and ones in numbers up to 1,200.

If a shape is divided into equal parts and one part is one third, into how many equal parts is the shape divided?
questions.explanation: One third means 1 of 3 equal parts.

questions.prompt: A pizza is cut into 3 equal pieces. One piece is one ___?
questions.explanation: 3 equal parts → each is one third.

questions.prompt: A pizza is cut into 2 equal pieces. One piece is one ___?
questions.explanation: 2 equal parts → each is one half.

questions.prompt: A pizza is cut into 4 equal pieces. One piece is one ___?
questions.explanation: 4 equal parts → each is one fourth.

questions.prompt: If a shape is divided into equal parts and one part is one fourth, into how many equal parts is the shape divided?
questions.explanation: One fourth means 1 of 4 equal parts.

questions.prompt: If a shape is divided into equal parts and one part is one half, into how many equal parts is the shape divided?
questions.explanation: One half means 1 of 2 equal parts.

units.title: Shapes
units.summary: Classify shapes by sides and corners.

lessons.title: Counting sides & corners
